author: SpunkyAmbassador

commands.description: Use this command to manually autosave the game. (Use this only and only when your 'Autosave Method' is 'Manual')
commands.name: Autosave

defaultParameters.description: 'Interval' - Autosave will happen after certain intervals, 'Teleport' - Autosave will happen everytime an object teleports, 'Menu Close' - Autosaves when player closes menu, 'All' - Autosave will happen in all conditions, 'Manual' - Manually autosave game
defaultParameters.name: Autosave Method

defaultParameters.description: Save slot number where the game will autosave
defaultParameters.name: Slot

defaultParameters.description: Autosave game when the save menu is forbid?
defaultParameters.name: SaveWhenForbid

defaultParameters.description: Let player save game in the autosave slot
defaultParameters.name: Overwrite Autosave

defaultParameters.description: Time in seconds between saves. Only works if "Autosave Method" is "Interval" or "All"
defaultParameters.name: Interval

description:
As the name suggests, Autosave plugin autosaves your game.

There are various 'Autosave Methods' to autosave your game.

Autosave Methods -
Interval - Autosave will happen after certain intervals
Teleport - Autosave will happen everytime an object teleports
Menu Close - Autosaves when player closes menu
All - Autosave will happen in all above conditions (manual autosave doesn't come under All)
Manual - Manually save game using 'Autosave' command

You can also prevent players from saving in autosave slot.

-------

To use this plugin, simply add it to your "Scripts/Plugin Manager" and tweak the 'Parameters' to your liking.

NOTE: If your 'Autosave Method' is NOT 'Manual', DO NOT use this plugin anywhere except "Scripts/Plugin Manager" or unforseen circumstances my arrive!

-------

To report any bugs or feature requests, ask it on RPG Paper Maker Discord.

Thank you for using this plugin!
